description_long: This object is a large, robust machine gun with a prominent cylindrical drum magazine mounted beneath the receiver, suggesting a high-capacity ammunition feed. The barrel is long and straight, featuring a perforated muzzle brake or compensator at the tip, likely for recoil reduction. The stock is solid and angular, extending directly from the rear of the receiver, and appears to be made of metal or a dense composite. The receiver is boxy and substantial, with visible mechanical details and a charging handle on the side. The overall finish is matte and utilitarian, with a uniform gray coloration. The design is functional and rugged, suitable for sustained automatic fire in urban combat scenarios.
description: A heavy-duty machine gun with a long barrel, large drum magazine, and solid angular stock, finished in matte gray. The design is robust and utilitarian, built for high-capacity automatic fire.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the machine gun, including the long barrel, large drum magazine, and angular stock.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular drum magazine and the muzzle brake at the end of the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the stock, receiver, and the length of the barrel with the muzzle brake visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the stock and the drum magazine, with the barrel extending away.
attribute_barrel_type: standard cylindrical barrel with perforated muzzle brake
